chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-265 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For Hearing of CMA 1239/25 3.For hearing of main case. 19-03-2025 Mr. Mir Raaz Ali Khan Bijarani, Advocate along with both petitioners. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G a/w ASI/I.O Aijaz Ali of P.S, Site Area Sukkur (respondent No.4). Farman Ali (respondent No.5) is present in person. ***** Mr. M. Adil Pathan, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of petitioner No.1. Learned AAG files statement on behalf of respondents No.2&4, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for the petitioners. The I.O is present and submits that he has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1 under section 161 CrPC, who in her statement, has denied the allegations mentioned in FIR and further submits that in view of such statement he will file report before the concerned Magistrate. After such statement, counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of the petition; however, prays that directions may be issued for protection. Under the above circumstances, the I.O is directed to submit report, as suggested by him within 15 days before the concerned Magistrate in view of that 161 CrPC statement of petitioner No.1. The I.O and official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. The petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
